description_long: This is a detached garage structure with a gabled roof clad in dark gray metal panels, providing a modern and durable appearance. The front facade features a wide, beige sectional garage door with subtle rectangular paneling and small upper windows, suggesting space for at least two vehicles. The walls are constructed from light gray masonry or concrete blocks, giving the building a solid and robust look. The roof overhangs the walls on all sides, offering additional protection from the elements. No windows or side doors are visible, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The overall design is simple and practical, suitable for suburban or urban residential settings.
description: A modern detached garage with a dark gray gabled metal roof, light gray masonry walls, and a wide beige sectional garage door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide beige sectional garage door and light gray masonry wall beneath the overhanging dark gray roof.
description_view_1: Side gable view displaying the triangular end of the building, the overhanging dark gray roof, and solid light gray wall with no openings.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without a garage door, showing only the light gray masonry wall and roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side gable view, mirroring view 1 with a solid light gray wall and prominent roof overhang.
